calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-30-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing. No appearance by defendant(s).
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Miles Lendway, CSR#13684.

Michael S. Rossoff, Esq., appearing for the Plaintiff TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION.
Kristy Koch sworn and examined of behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by Defendant NICOLE VERMILLION.
Court ordered defendants Does 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Lease is forfeited, .
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 680 Florida Street, #322, San Francisco, CA 94110.

Rents and Per Diem Damages $1,008.90
Pre-judgment interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $325.00
Costs $ waived.
for a Total Judgment of $1,333.90
Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Mar-30-2015 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-26-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: L. Fiscella; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Center is present. Represented by Kristy Koch.
Michael Sherwood Rosoff, Esq. appearing for the Plaintiff.
Defendant is NOT present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of MAR-30-2015 remains on calendar.
